allow: Bash(wsl bash -c "cd /mnt/c/projects/demo/cloudlightning-simulator && ./cl_sim input/CellData.json input/BrokerData.json input/AppData.json 2>&1 | head -100")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add infrastructure-agnostic RL agent and C++ simulator integration

- Add RL module with PPO-based agent for energy-efficient allocation
- Infrastructure-agnostic architecture supports any number of HW types
- Per-HW-type scoring with shared weights \(TaskEncoder, HWEncoder, Scorer\)
- Add RLAllocator adapter for /allocate_task endpoint integration
- Add scoring allocator for multi-objective weighted allocation
- Update FastAPI to support ''rl'' allocator type \(now default\)
- Trained model with 50k timesteps saved at models/rl/ppo/model_agnostic.pth
- Add comprehensive tests and documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add trained RL model weights

- model.pth: Original PPO model \(180KB\)
- model_agnostic.pth: Infrastructure-agnostic PPO model \(134KB, 50k timesteps\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
